info.name: University Student Portal API
info.description:
Dual-datasource API collection.

- `dynamo-as-datasource` → `http://127.0.0.1:8081` (`make app-run-dynamodb-seeded`)
- `postgres-as-datasource` → `http://127.0.0.1:8082` (`make app-run-postgres` after migrate)

Seed IDs match the DynamoDB development seeder (and Postgres after `make migrate-dynamo-to-postgres`). Run workflow folders in order; they capture IDs and optimistic versions automatically.

exec: pm.test('Exact alternate key returned one student', () => {

request.description: Only valid from ENROLLED or WAITLISTED. Run from the workflow before completing, or against a seeded ENROLLED enrollment.
